title: Hades Iris queue embed boundary

git diff --check -- apps/hub/modules/guardian/attendance/AttendancePage.tsx apps/hub/modules/caredesk/embeds/iris-collection-queue-embed.tsx docs/operations/panteon-work-execution-tree-2026-05-30.md docs/operations/panteon-recorte-manifest-md-20260531-023-hades-iris-queue-embed.json docs/operations/engineering-operations.md: PASS com avisos esperados LF/CRLF em AttendancePage.tsx e engineering-operations.md
rollback: Restaurar em AttendancePage.tsx o import direto de IrisPage e os dois usos <IrisPage embedded boardOnly queueSlugFilter="cobranca" />.
notes: Recorte escolhido apos Iris por criticidade estrutural: Hades tinha import direto da pagina raiz IrisPage.
O Hades agora consome um contrato publico IrisCollectionQueueEmbed mantido pela Iris, reduzindo acoplamento sem alterar UI ou fluxo.
Nao altera endpoint, payload funcional, regra financeira, Asaas, D4Sign, Guardian DB, env, secret, banco, Supabase admin, Vercel, Preview, homologacao ou producao.
